commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=872191ba3cee286f06ee000f5b4cdf3a16113a67)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Doctor lint/health plumbing so ordered core Doctor contributions provide structured checks first, then adds a structured legacy sandbox registry finding with dry-run repair effects while keeping real mutation on the legacy Doctor sandbox repair path.

PR surface: Source -19, Tests +586, Docs +2. Total +569 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a feature PR exposing existing legacy sandbox registry state through structured Doctor health. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path for the default-lint compatibility issue, but current-head real CLI proof is still absent.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining work is maintainer compatibility judgment, stacked-parent handling, and contributor proof rather than a narrow automated repair.

target.title: Doctor: expose sandbox registry findings
target.body:
## Summary

- Exposes legacy sandbox registry files as structured doctor health findings.
- Adds dry-run repair effects for migrate, remove-empty, and quarantine registry-file outcomes.
- Keeps the existing doctor:sandbox legacy run path as the only real mutating sandbox registry migration path for normal doctor / doctor --fix.
- Declares the structured check inline on the existing ordered doctor contribution, so this PR does not add another core registry entry.

This is intentionally the small sandbox registry slice from the older doctor repair stack. It does not migrate sandbox image builds, namespace probes, Docker checks, or plugin-sensitive doctor rules.

## Stack

Stacked on #86627. The only new sandbox commit in this PR is `872191ba3ce`; the sandbox delta is 4 files.

## Current Head

Rebased and signed head: `872191ba3ce`.

## Validation

- `git diff --check`
- `node node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/commands/doctor-sandbox.ts src/commands/doctor-sandbox.warns-sandbox-enabled-without-docker.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `node node_modules/oxlint/bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/commands/doctor-sandbox.ts src/commands/doctor-sandbox.warns-sandbox-enabled-without-docker.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental false --pretty false`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-sandbox.warns-sandbox-enabled-without-docker.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=dot --pool=forks --testTimeout=30000 --hookTimeout=30000` (2 files, 48 tests)
- 2026-06-03 refresh on signed head `872191ba3ce`: `git diff --check`; targeted `oxlint`; `pnpm exec vitest run --project commands src/commands/doctor-sandbox.warns-sandbox-enabled-without-docker.test.ts`; `pnpm exec vitest run --project commands src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts`; `pnpm exec vitest run --project unit src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts`.
- 2026-06-03 replayed onto fixed #86627 base; signed head `872191ba3ce`.
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
